summary: Iteration 30: Complete validation of Push Notifications (Web Push API with VAPID keys) and DB Pagination features. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified - Push Notifications card in Settings > Personalizacao, 7 RBAC roles in Settings > Equipe dropdown, Dashboard/Mindmap/Journey pages load correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/push/vapid-key returns publicKey (VAPID key configured)
Backend: POST /api/push/subscribe requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/push/subscribe stores subscription with auth token
Backend: DELETE /api/push/unsubscribe requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: DELETE /api/push/unsubscribe removes subscriptions with auth token
Backend: GET /api/brands returns brands (default pagination)
Backend: GET /api/brands?page=1&limit=2 returns paginated results
Backend: GET /api/brands?page=2&limit=1 returns second page
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/campaigns returns campaigns
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/campaigns?page=1&limit=10 returns paginated results
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/naming returns naming projects
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/naming?page=1&limit=10 returns paginated results
Backend: /sw-push.js service worker file is accessible
Frontend: Login flow works correctly (admin@labrand.com.br)
Frontend: Dashboard page loads correctly
Frontend: Mindmap page loads correctly with data-testid brand-mindmap-page
Frontend: Journey page loads correctly with data-testid brand-journey-page
Frontend: Settings page loads with data-testid settings-page
Frontend: Settings > Personalizacao tab shows Push Notifications card
Frontend: Push Notifications card has BellRing icon and correct title
Frontend: Push Notifications card shows description about browser notifications
Frontend: Push notification toggle present with data-testid push-notification-toggle
Frontend: Push toggle shows 'Bloqueado pelo navegador' message in headless (expected)
Frontend: Warning message about blocked notifications is visible
Frontend: Settings > Equipe tab shows invite member section
Frontend: Settings > Equipe tab shows all 7 RBAC roles in dropdown
Frontend: RBAC roles include Agencia section (Lider de Projeto, Editor, Colaborador, Visualizador)
Frontend: RBAC roles include Cliente section (Cliente Admin, Aprovador, Convidado)
critical_code_review_comments: push.py: Well-implemented VAPID key endpoint, subscribe/unsubscribe with proper auth dependency
push.py: send_push_to_user function correctly handles WebPushException and cleans up invalid subscriptions (404/410)
notifications.py: Correctly imports and calls send_push_to_user from push.py in create_notification
brands.py: Pagination implemented with page/limit params, skip calculation correct
campaigns.py: Pagination implemented with page/limit params, returns list directly
naming.py: Pagination implemented with page/limit params, returns {projects: []} structure
usePushNotifications.js: Clean hook implementation with permission/subscribed/loading states
usePushNotifications.js: Correctly handles urlBase64ToUint8Array conversion for VAPID key
sw-push.js: Service worker correctly handles push events and notification clicks
Settings.js: Push Notifications card properly integrated with usePushNotifications hook
Settings.js: Toggle correctly disabled when permission is denied/unsupported
Settings.js: All 7 RBAC roles properly defined in invite dropdown with Agencia/Cliente sections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 validated Push Notifications and Pagination features. Key findings: 1) Push notification backend APIs work correctly - VAPID key endpoint returns public key, subscribe/unsubscribe require auth and work properly. 2) Pagination works on /api/brands, /api/brands/{id}/campaigns, /api/brands/{id}/naming with page/limit params. 3) Frontend Settings > Personalizacao tab shows Push Notifications card with toggle (disabled in headless browser as expected). 4) Settings > Equipe tab shows all 7 RBAC roles in invite dropdown (Agencia: Lider de Projeto, Editor, Colaborador, Visualizador; Cliente: Cliente Admin, Aprovador, Convidado). 5) Dashboard, Mindmap, Journey pages all load correctly. NO MOCKED APIs - all endpoints are real.
notes: Push notification toggle shows as disabled in headless browser testing because Notification.permission is 'denied' - this is expected behavior. In a real browser with notification permissions granted, the toggle would be enabled and functional. The warning message 'As notificacoes push estao bloqueadas pelo seu navegador' is correctly displayed.
